ksa_text: Execute AI conformity assessment procedures, including selection and management of assessment pathways, notified body engagement, CE marking documentation, and post-assessment surveillance compliance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to AI Safety Researcher scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("conformity.{0,10}assess"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working AI Safety Researcher self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in AI Safety Researcher work (domain affinity 0.88, 1 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
